textByHash.0471a7b64e55c7464ff08544516ebc08ffe7cd5c: : The boys were upstairs when they disappeared. What if whatever took them climbed our wall and came through the window? If that's the case, we need to stop it from happening again!
textByHash.187a812faaaf79d341f69730263681556f262365: : Please, help us find our sons.
textByHash.20fcc26a2abc257756cce152c61fa79b73aee6fb: Thank you for finding our sons, iknami.
textByHash.21a82d24e98845a412588cbfe8382520354e2ec5: She should be by the main entrance into town. Thank you so much for doing all of this, iknami. It means everything to us.
textByHash.26a58def32e29676d97318bfe3f55f9349ae51be: Have you spoken to the boys yet?
textByHash.442f6912de3b4e72021fcb3990fb33e2560f3fc0: They're upstairs recovering. They need some rest, but they'll be okay.
textByHash.4cfc589827738a01eca45a70529b4f62ce1d8104: Well, they weren't the only ones to disappear. What if you're right? What if there are more people up there? And what if whatever took them comes back?
textByHash.52213c2317814d011eeae7a8ae9856bc54fb5ef7: Prove it! What do you know?
textByHash.59c0114727166e584bd50e327ce0f9898b0a97e3: You're back Did you find anything in the mountains?
textByHash.5bcb3f5ec875f8d26c404ed02d91609d738c35b2: If you're willing to, it would mean everything to us. You're the only one who's actually cared enough to find anything!
textByHash.783733cb89bd9efaef7699f1e713cd25124f1522: She should be by the main entrance into town. Thank you so much for doing all this, iknami. It means everything to us.
textByHash.7e54b1cf3384c8babc7d57387efd91ba28b825cf: Thank you, iknami. You'll be pleased to hear the boys are feeling a bit better.
textByHash.80b50b4b80c57337345bfef05fc47d52768a089d: Not yet. They need some rest first.
textByHash.814731a964420214387817400c82cb9f8edebfc7: The boys are resting at the moment. You'll have to come back later if you want to speak to them.
textByHash.83f6c88306ac5aec41af0ac8a0658bd3f9be07d3: You again? We already told you to go away!
textByHash.8c8e6e794fe9b53f698e8722e341126ae47f0a6f: That's the thing... They just seemed to vanish! One moment they were playing upstairs, but the next they'd gone.
textByHash.9441f592ad4cadd02c29a6d8813e953495852d66: I can't believe you found them!
textByHash.acc18468c9f10a66cf5fca04ee78b42a36119dd3: Yes, Etz does... What does it mean?
textByHash.aec8e37923e81077796999ed23d34a9c1d7b1f1b: Thank you. Please, help us find our sons.
textByHash.b153c756c93e7c04cbce467466203fe8596bd625: Thank you so much for doing all this, iknami. It means everything to us.
textByHash.bbf228f9440654df1688cd891e235b0a7ae23a4b: Please, help us find our sons.
textByHash.c77dceafda9e7df9d128d11a988682b1019a1146: Well... I suppose you do at least seem to somewhat care.
textByHash.c8c4fd1019b5c74de75b499f1938c34fbb0070ac: If you think it will help, then of course.
textByHash.d8391828f80e9871f263cb7c51532dab9d16bd27: Please leave. We're not in the mood for visitors.
